The Story

Building stories around things

Oorja grew up in an Army family, moving across the country from Shillong to Pune to Mumbai, which gave her a fluency in adapting fast and finding her footing anywhere. She studied Mass Communication at St. Xavier's College, Mumbai (9.3/10, Distinction), then earned a place at IIT Delhi's MBA programme with a 99.23 CAT percentile, and completed a Global Immersion at IÉSEG Paris in early 2026.

Experience

From IPL dugouts to global newsrooms

Six internships across five industries. Running PR for a cricket franchise, shaping strategy at a Fortune 500 FMCG, writing for Grazia, producing for national OTT platforms, and building campaigns at Nykaa.

Tata Consumer Products
Sales & Marketing Summer Trainee
2025
  • Improved demand and supply visibility by surveying 200+ retailers and consumers for 150+ SKUs
  • Pinpointed structurally weak markets across 30+ towns in Haryana using Rs. 50Cr+ data
  • Flagged 30-40% price-pack disadvantage vs. local rivals and drove visibility strategy through BTL levers
Rajasthan Royals
Strategic Communications Associate
2023 – 2024
  • Drove brand visibility through multi-format PR, delivering 10B+ Reach and $260M Media Value
  • Tracked and analysed 5,000+ media stories, achieving 90%+ positive sentiment
  • Deepened stakeholder engagement via spokesperson prep and 10 newsletters across 5+ groups
  • Coordinated 5+ internal teams and 10+ media partners to deliver 50+ campaigns
Forbes Advisor
Digital PR Trainee
2023
  • Built a 500+ prospect database, filtering low-authority sites across 10+ financial topics
  • Monitored 100+ mentions and backlinks, producing performance insights
  • Collaborated with editorial teams across USA and UK to standardise outreach and targeting
